title.en: Respiratory Rhythm of the Moss Void

description.ko: 생명을 불어넣는 이끼와 혈관 망이 고요하고 진주빛이 감도는 심연 속에서 빛을 내뿜는 유기적 호흡에 대한 영적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A spiritual exploration of organic respiration, where life-giving moss and vascular networks breathe light into a silent pearlescent abyss.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, representing the 'Organic Flow' theme. A pulsating, translucent respiratory lung structure woven from #7FB069 emerald moss and #2D5A3D vascular vines, floating in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent haze. It rhythmically exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent spores that swirl like liquid silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable membranes, high-speed fluid dynamics, Octane render, 8k, divine natural atmosphere.
